items: Shadow AI exploding: 80%+ of workers now use unapproved AI tools. Up from 41% in 2023 to 68% in latest data. Engineering teams at 79%.
Only 36% of companies have formal AI governance. 47% of employees access AI through personal/unmanaged accounts. AKT’s estimated exposure is consistent with industry.
Cost of inaction quantified: average shadow AI data breach now $4.2M. Shadow AI-related breaches cost $670K more per incident than other breaches.
79% of organisations face AI adoption challenges (double-digit increase YoY). 54% of C-suite say AI adoption is ‘tearing the company apart.’
